subject: Human Resources
title: The Spread of Disengagement
description: A quick win: understand The Spread of Disengagement.

hook.text: One disengaged person in a team of ten doesn't just underperform. They infect the mood of the other nine.

buildup.text: Disengagement is contagious—negativity, cynicism, and low effort spread through social networks in organizations.

discovery.text: Research shows emotional states transfer between coworkers. One chronically negative person can shift an entire team's culture.

twist.text: Managers often avoid addressing disengagement, hoping it resolves. But ignoring it signals to others that it's acceptable.

climax.text: Addressing disengagement quickly—through conversation, support, or reassignment—protects the wider team's energy.

punchline.text: Disengagement doesn't stay in one seat. It spreads to every chair.

quiz.question: Why must managers address disengagement quickly?
options: Because negativity is contagious and spreads to the team
Because it saves on office supplies
